summary: Iteration 46 — USER-SIGNED DEX swap backend tests. 14/14 passed. All hybrid and non-hybrid swap endpoints verified on the production preview URL against real 1inch + real BSC RPC + real PancakeSwap router. Zero platform-capital model confirmed.

minor.issue: Stale admin password 'Admin1234!' — actual working password is 'Admin123!' (also matches review request). File should be corrected to avoid future testing agents failing login.

action_items: Correct /app/memory/test_credentials.md: admin password is 'Admin123!' (not 'Admin1234!'). The review_request and live backend both confirm Admin123!.
critical_code_review_comments: swap_routes.py /hybrid/quote docstring still mentions 'Market Maker (NENO @ 10,000€)' and 'CEX fallback (Binance, MEXC, Kraken, Coinbase)', but the hybrid engine is now pure user-signed DEX. Update the docstring so it matches the new architecture and does not mislead future readers/API consumers.

swap_routes.py /hybrid/build docstring still advertises 'Market Maker' and 'CEX execution details (platform executes)'. In user-signed mode, execution_mode is always 'on-chain'. Docstring cleanup recommended.
hybrid_swap_engine.execute_swap() is kept as a stub returning a tuple — but /hybrid/execute route no longer calls it (returns 410 directly). The dead method can be removed for clarity.

swap_routes.py — the ledger insert inside _save_build does not use idempotency key; if /hybrid/build is retried with the same inputs, multiple 'built' ledger rows will appear. Consider deduping on (user_id, user_wallet, from_token, to_token, amount_in) within short window, or exposing an Idempotency-Key header like the other NENO routes.
Section banner in swap_routes.py still reads 'HYBRID SWAP ENDPOINTS (DEX + Market Maker + CEX Fallback)' — update to 'HYBRID SWAP ENDPOINTS (User-signed DEX)' to reflect reality.
seed_data_creation: None — track test uses a synthetic 0xaaaa... tx hash which correctly persists a 'pending' ledger row in db.swaps.
context_for_next_testing_agent: USER-SIGNED DEX swap model fully verified on BSC: (1) /api/swap/health → rpc_connected=true, oneinch_configured=true, chain_id=56. (2) /api/swap/tokens returns all 8 BSC tokens (NENO, USDT, BTCB, BUSD, WBNB, USDC, CAKE, ETH); WBNB address is canonical 0xbb4CdB9CBd36B01bD1cBaEBF2De08d9173bc095c. (3) /api/swap/hybrid/health returns status=operational, mode=user_signed_dex, capital_required=false. (4) /api/swap/hybrid/quote returns non-zero estimated_amount_out with source='1inch' for NENO→USDT, WBNB→BUSD, CAKE→USDT. (5) /api/swap/hybrid/build (JWT required) returns execution_mode='on-chain', valid 42-char router 'to', 0x-prefixed calldata, needs_approve flag + approve_calldata when allowance<amount; swap_id persisted. (6) /api/swap/hybrid/execute → 410 Gone as required. (7) /api/swap/quote + /api/swap/build (non-hybrid) both work. (8) /api/swap/track with fake tx_hash correctly records status='pending' and /api/swap/history returns ≥1 row for the user. (9) Same-token pair (USDT→USDT) returns 400. (10) No-liquidity pair (0x000...dEaD→USDT) returns quote source='estimate' with explanatory note, and build returns 422. IMPORTANT: admin password is 'Admin123!' (test_credentials.md is outdated showing 'Admin1234!').
rca_of_the_issue: No production issues found. Minor doc drift in swap_routes.py (docstrings still reference removed CEX/Market-Maker paths) and stale test_credentials.md password — both documented in action_items / code review comments.
